top_signals.title: Ukraine declares its first homegrown guided aerial bomb combat-ready
top_signals.summary: A 250-kilogram answer to Russia's daily glide-bomb campaign and Kyiv's dependence on Western precision strike capabilities for mid-range targets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Brazil Sends Cheap Soy Oil Abroad as Biodiesel Plan Stalls
top_signals.summary: The world’s top soybean producer Brazil is processing record amounts of the crop, but a delay in the country’s plans to boost local demand through biofuel mandates has resulted in an excess of cheap soy oil supplies being shipped overseas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
